title: Why Distance Gradients Matter for Robot Motion
excerpt: A distance value tells a robot how close it is. A useful gradient begins to tell it what to do next.

title: What a Spot Digital Twin Taught Me About Integration
excerpt: The hard part of a digital twin is not drawing another robot. It is making time, frames, interfaces, and people agree.

title: One Robotics Path Across Three Universities
excerpt: SUSTech, Aalto, and EPFL each changed how I think about building and researching robots.
